title: Double Flowers Retexture
description: Retexture of two block high flowers to brand new texture that suppose to look like if you would collect the flower to your hand
body:
## New textures for double flowers!

### This resource pack replaces default double flower textures with custom, brand-new designs for a fresh look. 
The textures are suppose to look more realistic like you acually grabbed the flower to your inventory, _also I suppose you can use it as a bouquet for someone close_.

<hr>

### ✨ Now with the new feature
Thanks to handheld third person view it can look even more as bouquet in your hands!!!
<details>
<summary>Reference image</summary>

![Handheld preview for flowers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/914964ff42bd04af4ad78845e7c1e6003fde1171.png)

</details>

_At least in Rose Bush and Peony cases bc the rest just looks like you could beat someone with them heh_

# 🌹 Flowers included in resource pack
### Items new textures:
- Rose Bush
- Lilac
- Peony
- Sunflower
- Pitcher Plant
### Blocks new textures:
- Sunflower model
- Pitcher Plant as a crop

# ⚙️ Technical stuff or something
- Go to my strawpage: [zuuup link](https://sniezekmod.straw.page/) for any of:
  - issues ⚠️
  -  your ideas 🧠
  -   just casual questions to me ❔
  
- Newest pack should work on 1.20+ bc that was the version when the pitcher plant was added but it should work on some older versions too, I'm just not sure how older versions would work because I don't have time to test that
  
- Instructions how to use for dummies:
  1. Just Install it
  2. Put it in the texture pack folder
  3. Turn it on and you good to go!
  
- ###  **License ARR, you can't modify neither reuploud any of my assets and credit as your own**
